blocks.text: Sourcing Signals  |  Lane-level screens point to Columbia expansion, Virginia concentration, and DDG-51 timing urgency.Lane count; indicator screens are not additive.973Virginia060Columbia91218DDG-51Concentration2nd-source entryRe-buy dueRecent supplier $B:   Virginia $1.77B   |   Columbia $2.40B   |   DDG-51 $1.63BProgram-level share hides the real jump balls. Top vendor share is only 34% in Virginia, 16% in Columbia, and 14% in DDG-51 - yet lane-level screens flag 18 concentrated, 25 source-diversification, and 21 near-term re-buy lanes.Columbia is the second-source expansion case. No concentrated lanes, but six source-diversification lanes - the N0002417C2117 electrical, piping, and structural lanes, all with FY22 second-source entry and large recent dollars.Virginia carries the clearest concentrated-incumbent pocket. Nine concentrated lanes; the largest is N0002417C2100 electrical power / distribution / generation, ~$503M recent supplier spend at ~93% top-1 (Northrop Grumman).DDG-51 adds timing urgency. Less program-level concentration, more re-buy timing: 18 lanes inside the 12-month horizon, including N0002423C2307 machining / mechanical / propulsion at ~$491M recent spend.ProgramPIIDWork typeSignalRecent $MSignal readColumbiaN0002417C2117Electrical power /distribution / generationSource diversification$1,138M29 recent vendors; top-1 ~54%;2nd source FY22VirginiaN0002417C2100Electrical power /distribution / generationConcentration +source diversification$503MTop-1 ~93%; Northrop Grumman;2nd source FY22ColumbiaN0002417C2117Piping / fluid handlingSource diversification$498M69 recent vendors; top-1 ~29%;2nd source FY22DDG-51N0002423C2307Machining / mechanical /propulsionRe-buy due$491MNext re-buy 2026-06-19;top-1 ~54%ColumbiaN0002417C2117Structural fabrication& modulesSource diversification$416M45 recent vendors; top-1 ~30%;2nd source FY22VirginiaN0002417C2100Structural fabrication& modulesSource diversification$296M37 recent vendors; top-1 ~29%;2nd source FY22Source: attached workbook - Overview, Lane Detail, By Vendor, PIID × Work Type, Re-buy Timing, Concentrated Lanes, Source Concentration; FSRS supplier-role subaward records, recent window FY22–FY26, as of 2026-05-22.
